messages.content:
Describe how this vulnerability could be mitigated in a CMS environment.

SQL Injection vulnerability discovered in Gila CMS 1.15.4 and earlier allows a remote attacker to execute arbitrary web scripts via the Area parameter under the Administration>Widget tab after the login portal.

Mitigation could involve using prepared statements, input validation, and parameterized queries to prevent injected queries. Regular security audits and updates to the latest version of the CMS are also recommended.
